decisions.briefing: Markets posted a modestly positive session with NASDAQ up 1.0% and S&P 500 up 0.4%, a neutral backdrop. With only $180.54 in cash — well below the $500 threshold — no new positions can be opened today. All six existing positions are held: AMZN continues to show the strongest momentum (score 95, RSI 68.5) and is slightly in the green; other holdings are monitored for stop-loss or profit-target triggers managed by the system.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced modestly on April 24, with the tech-heavy NASDAQ outperforming the broader S&P 500 as investors rotated back into growth and semiconductor names following a period of elevated volatility. A number of chip and AI-infrastructure stocks — including ARM, AMD, and NVDA — posted significant single-day gains, pushing RSI readings deep into overbought territory and signaling strong but potentially stretched momentum. The muted S&P 500 gain relative to NASDAQ suggests the rally remains concentrated in large-cap tech rather than broad market participation.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市於4月24日小幅上揚，科技股主導的納斯達克指數跑贏大盤，投資者在一段高波動時期後重新佈局成長股及半導體類股。ARM、AMD及NVDA等人工智能基建相關股份單日大幅攀升，RSI指標深入超買區域，顯示動能強勁但估值已偏高。相對於納斯達克的升幅，標普500指數漲幅較為溫和，反映此輪反彈主要由大型科技股帶動，市場整體參與度仍然偏窄。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast and how much a stock's price has moved recently, on a scale of 0–100. A reading above 70 signals the stock has risen very quickly and may be 'overbought' — meaning buyers have piled in aggressively and a pullback is more likely. Today's screener shows AMD at RSI 88.3, ARM at 87.5, and INTC at 86.5, which is why they score lower despite strong MACD signals — chasing them now raises the risk of buying right before a cooldown.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股價近期上漲的速度與幅度，數值介於0至100之間。當RSI超過70，代表股價短期內急速攀升，市場可能已「超買」——即買盤過於亢奮，股價回調的機率上升。今日選股名單中，AMD的RSI高達88.3、ARM為87.5、INTC為86.5，這正是它們儘管MACD信號強勁，但綜合評分仍偏低的原因——在RSI過高時追入，往往意味著在短期高位入市，承擔更大的回撤風險。
